title: Johnny Depp Designed Bottle for Rum Brand Using Inspiration From His Tattoos and Loves of His Life
summary: With longtime pal Bobby DeLeon, Depp launches Three Hearts Rum in a bottle he designed using inspiration from his tattoos, personal philosophy and the brand’s motto: “No Fear. No Malice. No Envy.”

title: How ‘Heated Rivalry’ Became a Musical (Parody)
summary: Composer and writer Dylan MarcAurele on developing the off-Broadway show, which pays loving homage to the series with songs like “Big Ass, Cold Heart” and “Shane Hollander Slap That Stick.”
